# Cloudsheer Consulting - Full Context

> Certified Salesforce & Agentforce consulting partner. Mid-market and enterprise focus. 26 team members, 60+ certifications, 4 global offices.

## Company Overview
Cloudsheer Consulting helps businesses automate support, sales, and operations using Salesforce and Agentforce AI agents. We are a certified Salesforce partner listed on AppExchange. Our team of 26 spans Dallas (USA), Delhi (India), London (UK), and New York (USA).

## What We Do
We implement the full Salesforce suite with a specialty in Agentforce - autonomous AI agents that work 24/7 inside your CRM. We handle everything from discovery to deployment to ongoing optimization.

## Solutions We Offer

### Agentforce (AI Agents)
Deploy autonomous AI agents for customer service, sales development, and operations. Agents resolve cases, qualify leads, update records, and book meetings without human involvement.
- 40% increase in case resolution (Wiley case study)
- 73% of queries handled autonomously (OpenTable)
- $2 avg cost per conversation vs $11+ human agent
- Go live in 4-6 weeks

### Sales Cloud
Close more deals with AI-powered pipeline management, lead scoring, forecasting, and CPQ.
- 29% average revenue increase
- 44% higher win rates with AI-guided selling
- 42% improvement in forecast accuracy
- 5x ROI over 3 years (Forrester TEI)

### Service Cloud
World-class customer support with omni-channel routing, AI self-service, field service, and SLA management.
- 30% faster case resolution
- 27% reduction in support costs
- 32% increase in first-contact resolution
- #1 CRM for service - 18 years running (Gartner)

### Marketing Cloud
Personalized customer journeys across email, SMS, social, and advertising with Einstein AI optimization.
- $36:$1 email marketing ROI (Litmus benchmark)
- 25% marketing ROI increase
- 41% higher CTR with Einstein Send Time Optimization
- 50% reduction in campaign build time

### Commerce Cloud
Unified B2B and B2C digital commerce with AI-powered personalization, order management, and global scaling.
- 29% conversion rate lift
- 25% AOV increase with Einstein recommendations
- 32% cart abandonment reduction
- 68% faster time-to-market

### Experience Cloud
Branded customer portals, partner communities, and self-service sites connected natively to Salesforce CRM.
- 48% support case reduction via self-service
- 3.4x ROI (Forrester TEI)
- 40% faster case resolution with portal tracking
- 50% partner onboarding cost reduction

### Analytics / CRM Analytics / Tableau
Real-time dashboards, AI predictions, and visual analytics embedded where your team works.
- 382% three-year ROI (Forrester TEI of Tableau)
- 28% improvement in forecast accuracy
- 65% faster report generation
- 10M+ Tableau users worldwide

### Salesforce Platform & AppExchange
Custom app development with low-code tools, Flow Builder automation, API integrations, and AppExchange solutions.
- 478% three-year ROI (Forrester TEI)
- 70% faster app delivery
- 80% less custom code with Flow Builder
- 10,000+ AppExchange apps available

### Slack
AI-powered collaboration platform integrated with Salesforce CRM for sales, service, and operations teams.
- 47% productivity increase
- 29% fewer meetings
- 32% fewer internal emails
- Slack Sales Elevate for pipeline management inside Slack

### Health Cloud
Patient/member 360, care coordination, engagement portals, and health data integration for healthcare and life sciences. HIPAA compliant.
- 30% patient satisfaction improvement
- 25% administrative cost reduction
- 40% faster care coordination
- HL7 FHIR and EHR integration support

## Our Process (The Cloudsheer Method)
1. **Discovery** - Audit your Salesforce org, map processes, identify highest-impact use cases
2. **Design** - Custom solution architecture around your workflows, data, and business rules
3. **Build & Validate** - Rigorous sandbox testing before production deployment
4. **Go Live & Measure** - Launch with KPI tracking, 30 days post-launch support included

## Typical Engagement Timeline
- Standard Salesforce implementation: 4-8 weeks
- Agentforce agent deployment: 3-6 weeks
- Multi-cloud implementation: 8-16 weeks

## Team
26 members across 4 offices with 60+ Salesforce certifications covering:
- Salesforce Administrator
- Platform Developer I & II
- Sales Cloud Consultant
- Service Cloud Consultant
- Marketing Cloud Consultant
- Agentforce Specialist
- Data Cloud Consultant
- Tableau CRM Analytics

- Financial Services
- Retail / E-commerce
- Healthcare / Life Sciences

- Manufacturing
- Professional Services
